title: VALID_ROLES const is the right single-source-of-truth pattern
description: Extracting VALID_ROLES as a const slice is correct: the old inline matches!(role, "admin"|"moderator"|"member") in apply_member_patch and the duplicated list in the error message were separate maintenance liabilities. Now both validate_member_patch and apply_member_patch reference the same slice, and the error message is generated from it (VALID_ROLES.join(", ")). A contributor might suggest inlining it back for "simplicity" — do not. The const is the only place to update when adding a new role.
